name: Testers Quality Pack
description: Bundles test-case generation, coverage gap analysis, and shared utility skills for QA engineers. Covers the full test design cycle from requirements to coverage review.
author: ai-skills-maintainer

delivery_modes.instructions: Use the test-case generation prompt for new features, then run the coverage gap analysis skill against the resulting test list.
Portal chains: test-case generation → coverage gap analysis as a single workflow invocation.
Expose as an MCP tool callable from Jira or ADO ticket processing workflows.
Deploy as a Copilot Studio skill accessible from the QA planning Teams channel.
Deploy via internal API layer for teams with strict data residency requirements.

configuration.additional_notes: Low temperature for consistent, reproducible test case generation.

changelog.notes: Initial package with coverage gap analysis skill and test-case generation prompt.
